title: Kimi Pauses New Consumer User Subscriptions Due to Computing Power Shortage, Accelerates Cluster Expansion
excerpt: At midnight on July 19, Kimi announced that due to the rapid growth in user request volume, the current computing power cluster is approaching its capacity limi
content_html:
At midnight on July 19, Kimi announced that due to the rapid growth in user request volume, the current computing power cluster is approaching its capacity limit. The team has decided to suspend new consumer users from subscribing and has initiated a computing power expansion plan.

Kimi stated that in the past 48 hours, the user request volume has significantly exceeded previous estimates, and the current computing power resources are nearing the maximum capacity of the cluster. To ensure the service experience for existing subscribed users, Kimi will prioritize the allocation of existing computing power resources to ensure that the rights of subscribed users are not affected. Meanwhile, the team is accelerating the computing power expansion. Once the new computing power is gradually in place, more subscription slots will be gradually opened until normal subscription services are restored.

In terms of subscription system adjustments, Kimi plans to separate the benefits for subsequent new users, managing the "Kimi main benefit" and the "Kimi Code benefit" separately. The Kimi main benefit covers product services such as Kimi Web, Kimi APP, and Kimi Work, while Kimi Code is aimed at code-related usage scenarios, to achieve more precise matching of computing power resources and improve overall service stability.

This pause in new subscriptions reflects the computing power supply pressure faced by model service providers against the backdrop of rapid growth in AI applications. As the scale of large model applications continues to expand, the balance between computing infrastructure, resource scheduling capabilities, and user growth is becoming an important challenge for AI companies' commercial operations.

sentences.en: At midnight on July 19, Kimi announced that due to the rapid growth in user request volume, the current computing power cluster is approaching its capacity limit.
sentences.zh: 7月19日午夜，Kimi宣布，由于用户请求量快速增长，当前算力集群已接近容量极限。

sentences.en: The team has decided to suspend new consumer users from subscribing and has initiated a computing power expansion plan.
sentences.zh: 团队决定暂停新消费用户订阅，并启动算力扩容计划。

blocks.html_en: Kimi stated that in the past 48 hours, the user request volume has significantly exceeded previous estimates, and the current computing power resources are nearing the maximum capacity of the cluster. To ensure the service experience for existing subscribed users, Kimi will prioritize the allocation of existing computing power resources to ensure that the rights of subscribed users are not affected. Meanwhile, the team is accelerating the computing power expansion. Once the new computing power is gradually in place, more subscription slots will be gradually opened until normal subscription services are restored.

sentences.zh: Kimi表示，过去48小时内，用户请求量已大幅超出此前预估，当前算力资源已接近集群最大容量。

sentences.en: To ensure the service experience for existing subscribed users, Kimi will prioritize the allocation of existing computing power resources to ensure that the rights of subscribed users are not affected.
sentences.zh: 为了保证现有订阅用户的服务体验，Kimi将优先分配现有算力资源，确保订阅用户的权益不受影响。

sentences.en: Meanwhile, the team is accelerating the computing power expansion.
sentences.zh: 与此同时，团队正在加速算力扩张。

sentences.en: Once the new computing power is gradually in place, more subscription slots will be gradually opened until normal subscription services are restored.
sentences.zh: 一旦新的算力逐渐到位，更多的订阅槽位将逐渐开放，直到恢复正常的订阅服务。

sentences.zh: 在订阅体系调整方面，Kimi计划将后续新用户的福利分开，分别管理“Kimi主福利”和“Kimi码福利”。

sentences.en: The Kimi main benefit covers product services such as Kimi Web, Kimi APP, and Kimi Work, while Kimi Code is aimed at code-related usage scenarios, to achieve more precise matching of computing power resources and improve overall service stability.
sentences.zh: Kimi主要受益涵盖Kimi Web、Kimi APP、Kimi Work等产品服务，而Kimi Code则针对代码相关的使用场景，实现更精准的算力资源匹配，提升整体服务稳定性。

blocks.html_en: This pause in new subscriptions reflects the computing power supply pressure faced by model service providers against the backdrop of rapid growth in AI applications. As the scale of large model applications continues to expand, the balance between computing infrastructure, resource scheduling capabilities, and user growth is becoming an important challenge for AI companies' commercial operations.

sentences.en: This pause in new subscriptions reflects the computing power supply pressure faced by model service providers against the backdrop of rapid growth in AI applications.
sentences.zh: 此次新增订阅的暂停，反映出在人工智能应用快速增长的背景下，模型服务商面临的算力供应压力。

sentences.en: As the scale of large model applications continues to expand, the balance between computing infrastructure, resource scheduling capabilities, and user growth is becoming an important challenge for AI companies' commercial operations.
sentences.zh: 随着大模型应用规模不断扩大，计算基础设施、资源调度能力和用户增长之间的平衡正成为AI企业商业运营的重要挑战。

content_html_zh:
7月19日午夜，Kimi宣布，由于用户请求量快速增长，当前算力集群已接近容量极限。 团队决定暂停新消费用户订阅，并启动算力扩容计划。

Kimi表示，过去48小时内，用户请求量已大幅超出此前预估，当前算力资源已接近集群最大容量。 为了保证现有订阅用户的服务体验，Kimi将优先分配现有算力资源，确保订阅用户的权益不受影响。 与此同时，团队正在加速算力扩张。 一旦新的算力逐渐到位，更多的订阅槽位将逐渐开放，直到恢复正常的订阅服务。

在订阅体系调整方面，Kimi计划将后续新用户的福利分开，分别管理“Kimi主福利”和“Kimi码福利”。 Kimi主要受益涵盖Kimi Web、Kimi APP、Kimi Work等产品服务，而Kimi Code则针对代码相关的使用场景，实现更精准的算力资源匹配，提升整体服务稳定性。

此次新增订阅的暂停，反映出在人工智能应用快速增长的背景下，模型服务商面临的算力供应压力。 随着大模型应用规模不断扩大，计算基础设施、资源调度能力和用户增长之间的平衡正成为AI企业商业运营的重要挑战。
